title: Pokémon
html: Stub. Game franchise Yahir was studying deeply enough at 16 to transcribe the full type-effectiveness chart by hand into a note. First mentioned in 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything. The note's title — "Normal > Neutral to Everything" — reads as both a literal type-chart fact (Normal type is neutral to most matchups) and an unintended self-portrait fragment.

related.label: Dream — Alexandria Haircut Trip + Card-as-Soul Attack
Normal > Neutral to Everything — Pokémon type chart, Christmas Eve 2018
